name: @octavio.bot/review
description: CLI for OpenCode-powered pull request review checks

scripts.sync:prompts: [ -d ../../packages/prompts/prompts ] || (echo 'Missing prompts source: ../../packages/prompts/prompts' && exit 1) && rm -rf ./prompts && mkdir -p ./prompts && cp ../../packages/prompts/prompts/*.md ./prompts/
scripts.build: bun run build:bin && bun run sync:prompts
